app_metadata.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla
app_metadata.name: teslamate

run_as_context.description: Container [api] can run as any non-root user and group.
Container [postgres] runs as non-root user and group.
Container [teslamate] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: TeslaMate

groups.name: User and Group Configuration
groups.description: Configure User and Group for TeslaMate

attrs.label: Postgres Image (CAUTION)
attrs.description:
If you are changing this after the postgres directory has been initialized,</br>
STOP! and make sure you have a backup of your data.</br>
Changing this will trigger an one way database upgrade.</br>
You can only select newer versions of postgres.</br>
Selecting an older version will refuse to start.</br>
If something goes wrong, you will have to restore from backup.

attrs.label: Database Password
attrs.description: The password for the TeslaMate database.

attrs.label: Encryption Key
attrs.description:
Key used to encrypt Tesla API tokens stored in the database.</br>
Must be kept secret and consistent across restarts.</br>
Changing this will invalidate stored tokens.

attrs.label: Enable TeslaMateAPI
attrs.description:
Enable the TeslaMateAPI container.</br>
Provides a REST API for TeslaMate data.</br>
See https://github.com/tobiasehlert/teslamateapi

attrs.label: API Token
attrs.description:
Authentication token for TeslaMateAPI (min 32 characters).</br>
Leave empty to disable API authentication.

attrs.label: Disable MQTT
attrs.description: Disable MQTT publishing entirely.

attrs.label: MQTT Host
attrs.description: The hostname or IP of your MQTT broker (e.g. eclipse-mosquitto app).

attrs.label: MQTT Port
attrs.description: The port of your MQTT broker.

attrs.label: MQTT Username
attrs.description: The username for the MQTT broker (leave empty if no auth).

attrs.label: MQTT Password
attrs.description: The password for the MQTT broker (leave empty if no auth).

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that TeslaMate files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Group ID
attrs.description: The group id that TeslaMate files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs

attrs.label: Networks
attrs.description: The docker networks to join

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)

attrs.label: Automatic Permissions
attrs.description:
Automatically set permissions for the host path.
Enabling this, will check the top level directory,</br>
If it finds incorrect permissions, it will `chown` the
host path to the user and group required for the
postgres container.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

attrs.description: Mount the volume as read only.

1.0.1.readme:
TeslaMate

TeslaMate is a self-hosted data logger for your Tesla.

For Grafana dashboard setup and advanced configuration see the official documentation.
